title: Farmers, Builders, and Travelers (FBT)
description: A lightweight modpack with basic refinements for comfort player experience
body:
A lightweight modpack with basic refinements for more comfort and interesting player experience. Contains mods for: 1. **Better performance** (optimized for use on low-end computers). 2. **More comfortable game** (Xaero maps, GUI clock, fast but still vanilla-like mining and tree cutting, full information about blocks and recipes, mouse tweaks, stack refill, trash slot, sleeping bags, etc.). 3. **Additional furniture, decorative, and building blocks** (new wall types, brick and wooden decor from Listvennica's Mod; simplistic, vanilla-like interior elements from Another Furniture; variety of blocks for cozy homes from Hearth & Home, Immersive Paintings). 4. **Farming toolkit**. Based on legendary Farmer's Delight, with vegan products from Vegan Delight; including wine, tea, beer, cheese making from Let's Do mods. Also there are tractors with various attachments (thanks to Automobility mod), perfect for large farms. 5. **Travels and adventures** (transport, additional structures). The modpack includes simple rustic aircraft (Immersive Aircraft) and vehicles from Automobility that allow you to travel much faster. You can explore new structures (from AdoraBuild: Structures, Towns and Towers) and dig up treasures buried in ancient mounds and temples (advanced archeology system from Better Archeology). 6. **Better world generation** (thanks to Continent and Geophilic). The modpack completely preserves vanilla biomes, adds several colorful vibrant locations from Mystic's Biomes. Try to find them all using a Nature's Compass! 7. **Improved villages and trading**. New types of settlements in different biomes (Towns and Towers), new professions, and work stations for villagers from Villagers Plus. Also, there is an advanced trading system, thanks to Village Business.
